description_long: This armchair features a classic, boxy silhouette with wide, gently sloping armrests and a deep, inviting seat. The upholstery is a traditional plaid fabric in shades of burgundy, brown, and tan, giving it a warm, vintage appearance. The seat and backrest are fully cushioned, providing comfort and support, while the armrests are seamlessly integrated into the frame. The chair stands on four ornately carved wooden cabriole legs, finished in a polished brown tone that contrasts with the fabric. The backrest is straight and slightly reclined, matching the overall geometric form of the chair. The overall design suggests a sturdy, comfortable piece suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A vintage-style armchair with plaid upholstery, wide armrests, and carved wooden cabriole legs. The chair is fully cushioned and exudes a warm, classic charm.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, straight backrest, and full plaid upholstery with visible wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped armrest, deep seat, and the profile of the wooden cabriole legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, fully upholstered back and all four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the armrest curve and the plaid pattern continuity.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, gently sloped, fully upholstered in plaid fabric
attribute_backrest_style: straight, medium height, fully upholstered with plaid fabric
attribute_leg_type: carved wooden cabriole legs with a polished finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: plaid fabric in burgundy, brown, and tan
